Hey, JB here. Time for your daily motivation slash skills training. Listen, belief suite is in full thrust here, right? I want to just tell you one thing flat out. I'm going to give you a belief to try on the size today, right? That you are capable of greatness. Now many of you probably walk around saying, yeah, yeah, I noticed you, but do you really believe that? Do you really think that you have what it takes to be great? I know you do, but do you really think so? And let me put it to you differently. What references do you have? How do you know? Like if you've never accomplished anything extraordinary in your life, how do you know? If you haven't been a straight A student, you haven't received awards, you haven't gotten rich yet. How do you know that you have what it takes to be a massive success? How do you know? It's a good question. I'm not trying to say that you're not successful, but I don't want you to try to, you know, bull yourself. We all walk around with that question in the back of our minds. Everybody, do I really have what it takes? Am I really special? Do I really stand out enough to have all the required skills in the clout to go out there and be extraordinary? Let me just tell you flat out. Your beliefs are directly related to the results that you get in the real world when you take action. Bottom line. So you have like a one-sided beliefs, right? And you have a limiting belief. It stops you from succeeding, but also poor results form limiting beliefs and stop you from exceeding. Because then the poor result comes first. It forms a limiting belief that reinforces itself by again and again getting worse results. Let me just tell you something. The way to interrupt this cycle is not just to try and let me overcome my limiting beliefs. It's to attack it from all angles. You want to get better at what you do. Skill up. You got to skill up. The reason I was able to take these kids who walked into my office in the 1980s and 90s and now even since then, millions of people around the world. How do I do it? People want to know what's my secret? How do I take all these people and they're writing all these success stories on my wall every day? How do I do it? You know how I do it? Twofold. I reinforce the belief change with skills training. One without the other is nonsense. If I just train you in the straight line, the skill sets, it won't matter. You'll be saddled by limiting beliefs. Likewise, if I just try to talk about beliefs and intergame stuff, it's not going to work because you'll go out and you'll still be the same old person. It's not extraordinary. You don't possess a special skill. See, what happened at Stratton is I taught these kids a special skill. What's happened with all these people around the world, these millions of people that have used the straight line and they have achieved level success they never thought they were capable of, it's I taught them a specialized skills that made them better than the people around them. At the same time, I attacked their limiting beliefs. That's the sort of one two punch that you need to really make change. One without the other, it's like delusion. Like you're saying, I am great, I am great. Let me tell you something. You might not be. You might not be. You might just be okay in the skill. Seriously, you just might not have special skills yet. You might just be an okay communicator. Maybe you don't know that much about marketing. Maybe you're just an okay business person, negotiator. It's probably, it's probably true. I mean, seriously, to be honest, you want to lie? The beauty is with the straight line system, you can change that. You become awesome. Actually, you skill up. You become a world class closer, a world class negotiator, an expert communicator. Then you can actually change your beliefs and have it stick. One without the other, it doesn't really work. That's why when I really would motivate people, like, you know, I'm thinking myself, my own crew, it's a mixture of skills training and daily motivation. That's why I say in the beginning, it's time for your daily motivation slash skills training. That's why I say it. Because they have to both be present for you to make progress. The straight line system is an outer world skill designed to increase your closing rate by making you better at selling, better at influencing, to increase your acumen to close deals. And it works like gangbusters, and everyone knows that. But the reason why I include the intergame counterpart is because you need to have it coming from both sides. That's a true recipe for success. So get out there and absorb this stuff, learn it, master it, internalize it, and use it at the same time, attack your beliefs. I promise you, if you do that, then you are, you are cable of greatness. You are extraordinary, and you can look yourself in the mirror and know that to be true. Because you've done the work when other people won't do it. If you want to get better results than everyone else around you, then you better be willing to do things that everyone else is not willing to do, and not only being wild or illegal, I mean work hard to skill yourself up to get better and more proficient at the things you actually do. Life is about skill set mixed with mindset. You put those two together, you can't go wrong. I love you all and I'll talk to you tomorrow.
